name: Halvas Tou Fourno (Baked Halvah)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix farina with cinnamon and set aside.
2. Cream butter in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, beat egg yolks with sugar until thick.
4. Add the butter mixture to the egg yolk mixture and beat very well.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff.
6. Fold the egg white mixture alternately into the butter-egg mixture.
7. Add almonds; mix gently.
8. Put the batter into a buttered pan.
9. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 45 minutes.
10. Prepare syrup by boiling sugar, water, cinnamon stick, and cloves together for about 8 minutes.
11. Remove and discard the cinnamon stick and cloves.
12. Pour syrup over hot halvah. Cool before serving.
